input.hiring_signal_brief: Website updated with new product roadmap; no layoffs, funding, or hiring announcements.
input.pricing_policy: Monthly retainers only; no hourly or project-based billing.

candidate_output: I saw Polaris just laid off 15 engineers and is rebuilding its platform—perfect chance to bring in our 3 high-performing devs to fill the gaps. We’ve got bandwidth starting next Monday.
